title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Evergreen India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Evergreen India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Logistics Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
